name: nat_add_comm
code:
import Mathlib

theorem nat_add_comm (a b : Nat) : a + b = b + a := by
  exact Nat.add_comm a b

name: bool_not_not
code:
import Mathlib

theorem bool_not_not (b : Bool) : !(!b) = b := by
  cases b <;> rfl

name: exp_monotone
code:
import Mathlib

theorem exp_monotone (a b : Nat) (h : a ≤ b) : 2^a ≤ 2^b := by
  apply Nat.pow_le_pow_right
  · norm_num
  · exact h

name: even_or_odd
code:
import Mathlib

theorem even_or_odd (n : ℕ) : Even n ∨ Odd n := Nat.even_or_odd n

name: injective_card_le
code:
import Mathlib

theorem injective_card_le (n m : ℕ) (f : Fin n → Fin m) (hf : Function.Injective f) : n ≤ m := by
  have h : Fintype.card (Fin n) ≤ Fintype.card (Fin m) := Fintype.card_le_of_injective f hf
  simpa [Fintype.card_fin] using h

name: exp_monotone
code:
import Mathlib

theorem exp_monotone (a b : Nat) (h : a ≤ b) : 2^a ≤ 2^b := by
  apply Nat.pow_le_pow_right
  · exact two_pos
  · exact h

name: surjective_card_ge
code:
import Mathlib

theorem surjective_card_ge (n m : ℕ) (f : Fin n → Fin m) (hf : Function.Surjective f) : n ≥ m := by
  have h : Fintype.card (Fin m) ≤ Fintype.card (Fin n) := Fintype.card_le_of_surjective f hf
  simpa [Fintype.card_fin] using h

name: finset_union_comm
code:
import Mathlib

theorem finset_union_comm {α : Type*} [DecidableEq α] (A B : Finset α) : A ∪ B = B ∪ A := by
  exact Finset.union_comm A B

theorem even_or_odd (n : ℕ) : Even n ∨ Odd n := by
  apply Nat.even_or_odd

name: disjoint_compl
code:
import Mathlib

theorem disjoint_compl (α : Type*) (s : Set α) : Disjoint s sᶜ := by
  apply disjoint_compl_right

name: subset_trans_sets
code:
import Mathlib

theorem subset_trans_sets (A B C : Set α) (h1 : A ⊆ B) (h2 : B ⊆ C) : A ⊆ C :=
  Set.Subset.trans h1 h2

name: nat_add_comm
code:
import Mathlib

theorem nat_add_comm (a b : Nat) : a + b = b + a := by
  exact Nat.add_comm a b

name: fintype_pigeonhole
code:
import Mathlib

theorem fintype_pigeonhole {α β : Type*} [Fintype α] [Fintype β] (f : α → β) (h : Fintype.card α > Fintype.card β) : ¬Function.Injective f := by
  intro h_inj
  have h_card : Fintype.card α ≤ Fintype.card β := by
    apply Fintype.card_le_of_injective f h_inj
  linarith

name: pow_two_ge_one
code:
import Mathlib

theorem pow_two_ge_one (n : ℕ) : 2 ^ n ≥ 1 := by
  apply Nat.one_le_pow
  <;> norm_num

name: card_powerset
code:
import Mathlib

theorem card_powerset (α : Type*) (n : ℕ) (s : Finset α) (h : s.card = n) :
  (s.powerset).card = 2 ^ n := by
  rw [Finset.card_powerset, h]

name: card_image_le
code:
import Mathlib

theorem card_image_le (s : Finset α) (f : α → β) [DecidableEq β] : (s.image f).card ≤ s.card := by
  apply Finset.card_image_le

name: list_length_append
code:
import Mathlib

theorem list_length_append (α : Type*) (A B : List α) :
    (A ++ B).length = A.length + B.length := by
  rw [List.length_append]

name: nat_pow_pos
code:
import Mathlib

theorem nat_pow_pos (n : ℕ) : (2:ℕ)^n > 0 := by
  have : (2:ℕ)^n > 0 := by positivity
  exact this

name: subset_trans_sets
code:

theorem subset_trans_sets (A B C : Set α) (h1 : A ⊆ B) (h2 : B ⊆ C) : A ⊆ C :=
  Set.Subset.trans h1 h2

name: even_or_odd
code:
import Mathlib

theorem even_or_odd : ∀ n : Nat, Even n ∨ Odd n := by
  intro n
  exact Nat.even_or_odd n

def even_or_odd' (n : ℕ) : Prop := (n % 2 = 0) ∨ (n % 2 = 1)

theorem even_or_odd_proof : ∀ n : ℕ, even_or_odd' n :=
  fun n => by
  have h := Nat.even_or_odd n
  cases h with
  | inl h => exact Or.inl (Nat.even_iff.mp h)
  | inr h => exact Or.inr (Nat.odd_iff.mp h)

name: cantor_no_surjection
code:
import Mathlib

theorem cantor_no_surjection (A : Type u) : ¬(∃ (f : A → Set A), Function.Surjective f) := by
  intro h_surj
  obtain ⟨f, h_surj⟩ := h_surj
  exact Function.cantor_surjective f h_surj

name: empty_subset

theorem empty_subset (s : Set α) : ∅ ⊆ s := by
